extraction.one_line_summary: MATTHEWS Michael won the field sprint on Stage 2 after DE GENDT Thomas took early breakaway victory and race lead before GC riders contested mountain finish.
tactical_patterns: DE GENDT Thomas exploited hard parcours for 4+ hour solo, understanding Catalunya rewards sustained aggressive riding over sprint positioning.
MATTHEWS Michael positioned late in sprint, forcing VALVERDE Alejandro to chase rather than initiate, neutralizing experienced finisher's tactical advantage.
FROOME Chris crashed 13+ minutes behind finish, suggesting Sky's recce or positioning strategy failed on technical approach to Stage 2 finale.
YATES Adam and MARTIN Dan contested mountain KOM sprint at near-standstill tempo, revealing mutual tactical stalemate despite strength advantage over peloton.

rider_signals.DE GENDT Thomas: positive: Sustained 4h14min solo breakaway for stage win and jersey, confirming Catalunya's hard profile suits his attrition-based aggression pattern.
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: Field sprint victory from disadvantaged position signals returning form after subdued early season, outfinishing VALVERDE in technical finish.
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: Crashed Stage 2, finished 13+ minutes down with road rash after struggling previous day, indicating mechanical vulnerability or positioning errors.
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: neutral: Second in sprint despite positioning advantage over MATTHEWS, suggesting hesitation or miscalculation in technical finale allowed escape.
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: Won mountain KOM sprint over MARTIN after tactical standoff, demonstrating strength but also revealing conservative approach to early-race opportunities.
rider_signals.MCCARTHY Jay: negative: Crashed into kerb approaching finish, showing positioning risk in technical finales when GC riders contest minor time bonuses.
